This toy is designed for children aged 5 and up, providing safe and engaging play for younger kids while encouraging creativity. How does the lizard toy enhance imaginative play? The stretchy lizard can be incorporated into various pretend scenarios, sparking creativity and storytelling during playtime. Is the lizard toy safe for children to use? Yes, the lizard toy is made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for children. Can this toy help children interact with their peers? Absolutely! Playing with the lizard toy encourages social interaction, helping kids develop communication skills while having fun with friends. What makes the lizard toy unique? The realistic design and stretchy, squishy material make this lizard toy a fun, tactile experience that captures children's curiosity.
